questions.question_text: CO Mapping Explain propped cantilever and fixed beams. 1 What is moment of resistance of timber beams? 2 Explain merits & demerits of timber structures. 2 Determine fixed end moment of a beam having span 8M and loading U.D.L = 20 Kn/m. 1 List some useful IS Codes for design of timber frames. 3 Define Arch and Dome. 4 Explain analysis of a beam by Area moment theorem. 1 Explain design procedure of steel beam having UDL on a simply supported beam. 2 CO Mapping
Define end beam. Explain analysis methods for fixed end beam. Show B.M & S.F diagrams.
Draw B.M Diagram for a fixed beam AB of span 6m and loading U.D.L of 30Kn/m. CO Mapping
Calculate moment of resistance of timber beam section having width = 150mm and depth d= 250mm. Assume allowable stress in timber is 12N/mm2.
Describe the steps to calculate the foundation width for a two-storey residential brick structure. Include a neat plan and section of the brick wall foundation. CO Mapping
Name the modern methods of analysis to determine bending moment & shear force for designing the beams and columns in frame.
Write down names of different method of analysis of frames. CO Mapping
Explain different types of forces acting on shell structure.
List and describe the types of forces acting on an arches & vaults.
